error_snippet:
|
97 | let mut data = co.data;
   |                ------- value partially moved here
98 | drop(co);
   |      ^^ value used here after partial move

   = note: partial move occurs because `co.data` has type `Box<dyn Any>`, which does not implement the `Copy` trait

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0382`.
